title: 第 73 節
en: Galandharayana, name of a gotra, Gambû, name of a Sthavira, 295.
Gambfidvipa, 190, 218, &c. Gambfinaman = Gambû, 287. Gambfisvamin = Gambá, r.
Gasamsa, name of Mahavira, 193, Gayanta, name of a Sthavira, Gehila (Gettdila), name off a Sthavira, 294.
Gaatri or G#atrika, clan of Kshatriyas, 191, 226, &c.
GAatriputra, name of Mahávira, 76, G#atrishanda, name of a park, 199.
Gyotishka, one of the four orders of gods, 191, 195, 252.
Haritamalagari, name of a Sakha, Háritáyaza, name of a gotra, 286.
Indrabhüti, name of a Gazadhara, -— name of another man, 265.
Ingitamaraza, a religious death, 72 {s4na, different from Indra, 198.
Island, never covered with water, likened to an ascetic, 58, 61.
Jewels, different kinds of, 238. — sixteen kinds of, 227.
